Recovery 46 • Sleep 72 • Strain —

Read
Recovery is muted tonight, and the workout window reads more like a checkpoint than a place for extra strain. Intake is running light where muscle retention matters most, so the day favors repair, steadiness, and a narrower deficit over added output.

Quiet consolidation.
